'''Brigantes Ustu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] who was in charge in watching over a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Forceful]] children in the catacombs of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plett]]'s house on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] during the time of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].[[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]] recalled her being nearly two meters in height.

{{Char-stub}}
